title: Bihar Board Class 10th Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Bihar Board Class 10th Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Bihar School Examination Board Result 2026 out for Class 10th (Matric) annual exams on the official website - biharboardonline.bihar.gov.in on 29-03-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Bihar Board 10th result.

content.text: Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB) has officially declared the Bihar Board Class 10th Result 2026 for the annual matric examinations. The Class 10th marks and pass status have been made available online for all registered students of the 2025-26 academic session. Bihar Board Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - biharboardonline.bihar.gov.in.

Students can check and download their Bihar Board 10th marksheet by visiting the official result portal, entering their roll code and roll number and verifying the displayed details. After downloading the online scorecard, they should carefully check their name, roll number, subjects, marks, division and overall result status and contact their school or the board in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: Bihar Board Class 10th Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: BSEB has published the Class 10th matric results for lakhs of students across Bihar through its official website and dedicated result portals. This release marks the completion of the evaluation process for the 2026 matric exams and enables students to plan admission to Class 11th or other courses.

sections.heading: Bihar Board Class 10th Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: BSEB has activated the Class 10th result link on its official portals so that students can quickly access their matric scores using their exam credentials. Use the table below to reach the correct websites.

links.label: Bihar Board Class 10th (Matric) Result 2026 - Official Portal
Bihar Board Class 10th Result 2026 - Alternate Result Website

sections.heading: How to Check Bihar Board Class 10th Result 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download your Bihar Board 10th Result 2026:

items: Go to the official Bihar Board website: https://biharboardonline.bihar.gov.in/ or visit https://matricbiharboard.com/.
On the homepage, click on the link that mentions “Annual Matric Exam Result 2026” or similar.
You will be redirected to the result login page.
Enter your Roll Code and Roll Number as printed on your admit card.
Click on Submit / View Result / Search to display your Class 10th marksheet.
Check your personal details, subject wise marks, total marks, percentage and division, then download or print the marksheet for future use in admissions and documentation.

structured_links.label: Bihar Board Class 10th (Matric) Result 2026 - Official Portal
